The '''First Sun Mobile Regiment''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] outfit that worked with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The First Sun Mobile Regiment specialty was [[Search, Locate, Annihilate Mission|Search, Locate and Annihilate operations]]. As such, they would be supported by infantry vehicles and would contract out to the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] whenever the latter had need of their talents. Their relationship turned sour when [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Nile Owen]] [[Battle of unidentified outpost|executed]] an entire company of the First Sun Regiment, after which the Regiment distanced itself from the Empire. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maska Zural]], the leader of the First Sun Mobile Regiment, would then hire the group out to the highest bidder.
